title: Better Quest Pop-up
body:
**An addon for FTB Quests to display quest complete pop-up!**

![Replace this with a description](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/8bcb718bd4385b16fa04f5cbab68cee5ffc5d1c9.png)

## Dependencies
- Requires [FTB Quests](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/ftb-quests-forge) and all its dependencies.

## Notes:
- This is a client-side mod.
- Feel free to use this mod in any modpacks.

## Mod compatibilities:
Empty...



## Mod Incompatibilities:
- Optifine
